concept: A scowling cartoon T-Rex clutching a giant iced coffee with smoke puffing from his ears — the universal mascot for people running on pure caffeine, grudges, and unfinished group-chat drama.
title: Fueled By Spite And Iced Coffee T-Rex Shirt, Funny Sarcastic Burnout Tee, Iced Coffee Lover Gift, Millennial Humor Dinosaur T-Shirt, Petty E
description:
For the petty legends running on iced coffee and unresolved grudges.

This shirt says what your group chat has been saying all week: you are not tired, you are FUELED — by spite, caffeine, and the audacity of whoever wronged you last Tuesday. Features a grumpy T-Rex with tiny arms, ear-smoke, and a giant iced coffee cup that is frankly rude.

Perfect for:
• The coworker who replies "per my last email"
• Iced coffee people who refuse to switch to hot, even in December
• Anyone whose personality is 80% caffeine, 20% grudge
• Gifting the friend who says "I'm fine" through gritted teeth

DETAILS
• Premium soft-feel unisex tee, true-to-size
• Vibrant print that won't crack, peel, or fade
• Available in both light and dark colorways
• Made-to-order and printed with care

Fit tip: runs true to size. Size up for that oversized thrift-shop look.

Handled, packed, and shipped from BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I reply faster than you'd expect from someone running on spite.

dark_print.notes: Minor distressed-texture specks in typography — intended aesthetic for vintage grunge lettering.

mockup_2.notes: Subtle hand-on-glass softness — acceptable for shop standards.
